prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 100 名持续上升至 2026 年第 79 名，近年排名稳步提升，综合实力增强；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉文件中均未出现显著舆情事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第 80 位，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显的报考关注升温信号；民族学 A+（全国顶尖）、中国语言文学 A-、社会学 A-，共 3 个 A- 及以上学科；民族学为该校王牌，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年陕西省物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 21.62% 以及本省物理类考生大幅增加约 19.7%，考生规模扩大与扩招基本对冲，但考生增幅略大于扩招幅度，预计竞争略有加剧；预测 2026 年最低位次约 13477 名，区间 12977–13977 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 10400→12283→12076→11232→11885, fluctuating within the range of 10400–12283, with a baseline of about 11885 in 2025; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 37 in 2025 (Physics Category); the 2026 plan is 45, an increase of about 21.62% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing continuous improvement in recent years and enhanced overall strength; no significant public opinion incidents occurred in the reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, indicating a stable reputation; its overall ranking on Douyin popularity is 80th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderately low level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; it has 3 A- or above disciplines: Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, and Sociology A-; Ethnology is its flagship discipline, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of approximately 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the significant enrollment expansion of about 21.62% in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 19.7% in provincial Physics Category candidates, the expansion of candidates and enrollment largely offset each other, but the candidate growth rate is slightly larger than the expansion rate, suggesting a slight intensification of competition; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 13,477, with a range of 12,977–13,977.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12,977–13,977, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 12,977), you can focus on aiming for Computer Category and Electronic Information Category; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 13,977), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing continuous improvement in recent years and enhanced comprehensive strength; no significant public opinion incidents appeared in the reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, maintaining a stable reputation; its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderately low level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature is A-, Sociology is A-, with a total of 3 disciplines rated A- or above; Ethnology is the university's flagship program, attracting some interest in related majors.
